name: io.github.atlasprzetargow/mcp
description: Search Polish public tenders (BZP + TED) — 800k+ tenders, profiles, statistics, glossary.

environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for /api/llm/* endpoints (unlocks AI-generated tender summaries). Without the key, all public Atlas endpoints still work in full.

environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override for the Atlas Przetargów API root. Defaults to https://atlasprzetargow.pl
